text:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/deskutils/gtg/pkg-plist.diff?r1=1.8;r2=1.9
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/deskutils/gtg/pkg-plist.diff?r1=1.9;r2=1.10
